section.heading: Fees of recorders in Alaska for filing proofs of work and improvements

content.p: The recorders for the several divisions or districts of Alaska shall collect the sum of $1.50 as a fee for the filing, recording, and indexing annual proofs of work and improvements for each claim so recorded under the provisions of section 49e of this title.

note.heading: Codification
note.p: Section was formerly classified to section 385 of Title 48, Territories and Insular Possessions.

note.heading: Admission of Alaska as State
note.p: Admission of Alaska into the Union was accomplished Jan. 3, 1959, on issuance of Proc. No. 3269, Jan. 3, 1959, 24 F.R. 81, 73 Stat. c16, as required by sections 1 and 8(c) of Pub. L. 85–508, July 7, 1958, 72 Stat. 339, set out as notes preceding section 21 of Title 48, Territories and Insular Possessions.
